title: Meters; inspection
doc_html:
§849.  Meters; inspection

The several municipalities of this state may appoint inspectors to carry out the intent and purposes of R.S. 45:845 through 45:848 and pass ordinances providing for the inspection of gas, water, electric light and power meters, and fixing the expense of these inspections.
doc_text:
§849.  Meters; inspection
The several municipalities of this state may appoint inspectors to carry out the intent and purposes of R.S. 45:845 through 45:848 and pass ordinances providing for the inspection of gas, water, electric light and power meters, and fixing the expense of these inspections.
